evals.prompt: hey i just added a new env var AUTH_MAX_PATS_PER_USER to apps/api/src/common/config/auth.config.ts — it caps how many personal access tokens one user can create, defaults to 10. can you update the docs
evals.expected_output: reference/environment-variables.mdx gains a correctly formatted table row for AUTH_MAX_PATS_PER_USER with default 10; no generated MCP pages touched; frontmatter intact.
evals.seed_change: Append a DEFAULT_MAX_PATS_PER_USER constant and maxPatsPerUser() env reader to apps/api/src/common/config/auth.config.ts, committed before the run.
assertions: No generated MCP tool pages were modified
Edited pages keep valid frontmatter (title + description)
New row follows the | Variable | Default | Required | What it does | table format with the variable in backticks

evals.prompt: I updated the description of the create_issue tool in the mcp registry (packages/contracts). make sure the docs are in sync with it
evals.expected_output: The agent regenerates the MCP tool pages via the generator script rather than hand-editing; create_issue.mdx and the mcp-tools index both carry the new description; re-running the generator produces no further diff.
evals.seed_change: In packages/contracts/src/mcp/registry.ts, change the create_issue description from 'Create a work item (title-only or structured fields).' to 'Create a work item (title-only or structured fields). Returns the new item id and url.', committed before the run.
assertions: reference/mcp-tools/create_issue.mdx contains the updated description text
The generated-file marker comment is preserved in create_issue.mdx
reference/mcp-tools/index.mdx also reflects the updated description
Re-running generate-mcp-pages.mjs after the agent finishes produces no further git diff
